text: Step 1.

Cut the peritoneum along the line with an ultrasonic scalpel.

Told space is a natural fusion fascia without blood vessels and without important anatomic structures.
It can be very easy, very safe and a very simple separation.

Step 3.
A median to lateral approach was performed by dissecting the right side of the greater omentum.
